description: Style Note A perfume named after one of the most thriving and lively cities of the world, this perfume is a definite crowd pleaser. police gives you New york with a vibrant and lasting smell which is fresh and refreshing. Product Details Police New York is a spray perfume for women which comes in a glass flask with a shiny pink upper and front Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 50 ml
